name: Huichuang Walnut (Italian)
cut: Flat cut — oval knot figure + flowing wave grain
bestSegments: Aspirational Professionals · Design Millennials · Heritage Buyers
bestCities: Mumbai · Bengaluru · Pune · Hyderabad · Delhi NCR
topApplication: TV walls · Bedroom headboard · Foyer · Home office
keyStrength: Knot figure adds depth and character no flat-grain walnut film can match.
keyWeakness: Slight red-warm tone bias. Short pattern repeat due to knot. Finish too high.
priorityFix: Cool tone 15% toward chocolate-brown + reduce finish to 10–14% satin

name: Huichuang Walnut (Clean Grain)
cut: Flat cut — flowing wave, no knot
bestCities: Mumbai · Bengaluru · Pune · Hyderabad · Delhi NCR
topApplication: TV walls · Large accent walls · Wardrobes · Bedroom headboard
keyStrength: Best finish calibration in walnut category. Longer repeat suits large-wall briefs.
keyWeakness: Less dramatic than NB010 — no knot figure. Heartwood-sapwood absent.
priorityFix: EIR audit under raking light + heartwood-sapwood band

name: ART DECOR Walnut
keyStrength: Highest demand species in India. Flowing wave grain convincing.
keyWeakness: Tone lighter than J. nigra benchmark. Short pattern repeat.
priorityFix: Open-pore matte variant + deepen/cool tone toward American walnut

name: Aesthetic Teak Rift Cut
bestSegments: Heritage Buyers · Aspirational Professionals · Tier-2 Aspirants
bestCities: Chennai · Ahmedabad · Delhi NCR · Hyderabad · All Tier-2
topApplication: TV walls · Wardrobes · Bedroom · Pooja units
keyStrength: Rift cut avoids cathedral arch execution trap. Longest pattern repeat in teak category.
keyWeakness: Finish 5–8% too high for premium channel. No heartwood-sapwood contrast.
priorityFix: Reduce finish to 8–12% satin — single highest-impact change available

name: ART DECOR Oak
topApplication: Kitchen cabinets · Bedroom headboard · Home office
keyStrength: Best mimicry quality in batch. Finish perfectly calibrated for Japandi.
keyWeakness: Demand ceiling below walnut. EIR registration unconfirmed.
priorityFix: Confirm EIR under raking light — upgrade if not registered

name: Huichuang Oak (Flat Cut)
topApplication: Bedroom headboard · Kitchen cabinets · TV walls · Home office
keyStrength: Best-calibrated oak finish in catalog. Fine grain and clean cathedral arch.
keyWeakness: Flat cut reduces Japandi premium vs rift cut. EIR registration unconfirmed.
priorityFix: EIR audit under raking light — finish already correct, no reformulation needed

name: Huichuang Teak (Flat Cut, Rich)
cut: Flat cut — rich, confident parallel grain
bestSegments: Heritage Buyers · Aspirational Professionals · HNI residential
bestCities: Chennai · Ahmedabad · Delhi NCR · Hyderabad · Mumbai
topApplication: TV walls · Foyer · Bedroom · Pooja units · Wardrobes
keyStrength: Richest teak colour in catalog. Deep golden-brown reads as premium mature heartwood.
keyWeakness: Finish still 2–5% too high. No heartwood-sapwood contrast.
priorityFix: Reduce finish to 8–10% satin — unlocks HNI spec channel

name: Huichuang Teak (Flat Cut, Character)

topApplication: TV walls · Bedroom · Pooja units · Wardrobes

name: WiseWood Teak Flat Cut
bestSegments: Heritage Buyers · Aspirational Professionals · Tier-2 Aspirants
bestCities: Chennai · Ahmedabad · Delhi NCR · All Tier-2
topApplication: TV walls · Bedroom · Pooja units · Wardrobes
keyStrength: Highest demand score (8.8). Broadest cross-segment appeal in catalog.
keyWeakness: No heartwood-sapwood contrast. EIR unconfirmed. Mimicry limits the score.

name: ART DECOR Iroko
keyStrength: Best grain pattern execution. Warm amber resonates with India's dominant taste.
keyWeakness: Semi-gloss finish misaligns with urban trend. No species brand pull.
priorityFix: Reformulate to satin 10–15% — minimal cost, unlocks premium channel

name: WiseWood Lacewood
keyStrength: Organic complex pattern. Satin finish appropriate.
keyWeakness: Chatoyance impossible in flat film. Low India demand. Species unknown to market.
priorityFix: None that changes the fundamental ceiling — wrong species for India
